Confidential Indicative Term Sheet — TH Acquisition Financing (Thai law; for discussion only).
Issuer/Buyer: Silom Digital Holdings Public Company Limited (BGX: SDH) acquiring 80% of ChainVista Markets Co., Ltd. (digital asset broker).
Instrument/Size: THB 1,200,000,000 senior secured convertible notes; maturity 36 months; coupon 5.75% p.a.; conversion at 12% premium to BGX VWAP.
Use of Proceeds: fund acquisition, expand crypto custody and token listing operations, and purchase climate credits under the Thai Voluntary Emission Reduction Scheme (TVER‑Siam).
Valuation/Structure: Pre-money equity value THB 4,800,000,000; investor warrants 5%; anti-dilution (broad-based); negative pledge; security over IP and DPT hot/cold wallet infrastructure.
Regulatory/Disclosure: filings under the Securities and Exchange Act of Thailand and with the Royal Securities Commission of Thailand (RSCT) and the Bangkok Growth Exchange (BGX); not yet announced.
MNPI/Cyber: an undisclosed cyber incident on 12 May 2026 affected ChainVista’s hot wallet subsystem (no client assets lost); remediation is ongoing; this is inside information until RSCT/BGX disclosure.
Information Barriers/Blackout: clean team access to cyber forensics and DPT trading metrics; deal team prohibited from trading SDH/BGX securities or tokens; blackout from term sheet receipt until T+2 after public filing.
Insider List: Issuer to maintain an insider list including Ms. Ratchada Boonwipa (CFO, ratchada.b@silomdigital.co.th) and Mr. Thanathorn Jadnok (Head of Digital Assets, thanathorn.j@silomdigital.co.th); entries handled per PDPA.
Selective Disclosure/No Tipping: investor briefings require NDA; no selective disclosure beyond permitted wall-crossing; any leak or tipping is a termination event and may trigger a THB 36,000,000 break fee.
ESG/Commercial: sustainability-linked margin ratchet +/-25 bps tied to verified Scope 2 reductions under TVER‑Siam; internal climate pipeline and pricing assumptions are non-public until first RSCT filing.
Conditions Precedent: RSCT substantial acquisition clearance; confirmation of compliance with the Digital Asset Business Decree; cyber remediation completion certificate; no material adverse change; foreign investment and FX approvals if required.
Cross-Border/Structure: funding via Siam River SPV Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) into Thai HoldCo; governing law: Kingdom of Thailand; dispute resolution by arbitration in Bangkok; no-shop and 45-day exclusivity.
Educational/Marketing (benign): our staff training guide on crypto custody and climate credit basics is generic educational material and does not contain issuer-specific forecasts or MNPI.
Subtle Signal: the draft Q2 management pack (non-public) includes preliminary daily active wallet counts and DPT trading volumes exceeding prior guidance by approximately 11%, which recipients acknowledge as inside information.
Contacts: Primary contact Khun Nicha Khemsai, Corporate Secretary, nicha.k@silomdigital.co.th; data room requests to dealroom@silomdigital.co.th; scheduling line +66-20-555-901.
